column3:
Visit of port of Koper and exchange of views on the ongoing projects supported through Connecting Europe Facility (CEF) as well as future needs. - The Commissioner visited, together with the Minister of Infrastructure Alenka Bratusek and her team, the Port of Koper, a critical hub for container and automotive flows in Mediterranean.
- The port presented completed and ongoing CEF projects focused on improving maritime and land accessibility,
